CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-07-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT ANGELICA BONILLA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $400, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. NO APPEARANCES; TENTATIVE ADOPTED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-23-2010 VACATED. MATTER SET ON CRC 3.1385 DISMISSAL CALENDAR ON 8/7/2012 AT 10:00AM IN DEPT. 212. (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-07-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Document From Pltfs And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ANGELICA BONILLA's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents From Plaintiff is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $400, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Document From Pltfs And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Continued To May-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Dan Ianitelli, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Angelica Bonilla
Robert Garcia, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Tito Flores

RULING: HEARING HELD: DEFENDANT ANGELICA BONILLA's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Document From Pltfs And Request For Sanctions is contiued tp May 17, 2010 at 9:00am at the request of moving party. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
